touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Samuel Green introducing our forecasting solution for CS teams. No response received.
Follow-up cold email to Samuel highlighting ROI case study from similar managed IT company. No response received.
Brief cold call with Samuel Green. He mentioned they're currently tracking forecasts manually in spreadsheets and expressed interest in learning more. Agreed to send additional materials.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently managing forecast accuracy for your CS team?
questions_asked.answer: We're using spreadsheets and it's pretty manual. Hard to get real visibility.

touches.ai_summary: Attempted follow-up call to Samuel. No answer, left voicemail referencing previous conversation.
LinkedIn message sent to Samuel sharing relevant article on CS forecasting best practices. No response received.
Follow-up email to Samuel with case study and one-pager. He replied expressing interest and asked about pricing range for their team size.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical pricing for a team our size (around 40-50 seats)?
questions_asked.answer: For that range, typically $40-60K ACV depending on feature tier. Happy to discuss specifics on a call.

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message sent to Samuel confirming interest in scheduling a call. No response received.
Brief qualification call with Samuel. Confirmed team size (42 CS seats) and current pain points. Call cut short due to Samuel's meeting conflict, agreed to reconnect.

questions_asked.question: How many seats would you need for the CS team?
questions_asked.answer: 42 seats for our CS team right now.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Samuel Green. Discussed their forecasting challenges in depth—currently missing targets by 15-20% each quarter. Samuel is the Director of CS and sees this as critical for their growth. He mentioned needing to loop in Harper Ali (CRO) for budget approval. Confirmed interest in automations plus consulting tier.

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecast accuracy gap?
questions_asked.answer: We're missing by 15-20% each quarter. It's becoming a real problem with the exec team.

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Harper Ali, our CRO, would need to sign off. I can champion it internally.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Samuel with discovery call prep guide and calendar invite. He confirmed the time and said he's gathering data on their current process.

Follow-up call with Samuel to prep for discovery. He shared that they're evaluating this quarter and have budget allocated. Discussed involving Dylan Iyer (Sales Manager) for technical evaluation since he manages their CRM integrations.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We're looking to decide this quarter. Budget is already allocated for CS tools.

questions_asked.question: How does this integrate with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: We have native integrations with all major CRMs. Dylan Iyer could do a technical eval to validate that.

next_steps: Plan for technical evaluation with Dylan

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Samuel Green. Walked through their current forecasting workflow, pain points (manual data entry, lack of visibility, poor accuracy), and desired outcomes (90%+ accuracy, automated reporting). Samuel confirmed Harper Ali is supportive and that Dylan Iyer will need to validate technical fit. Discussed the automations_plus_consulting package as the best fit for their complexity.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Getting to 90%+ forecast accuracy and eliminating manual spreadsheet work. Our CRO wants automated weekly reports.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 4-6 weeks for the automations_plus_consulting tier with dedicated support.

questions_asked.question: Have you looked at other solutions?
questions_asked.answer: Not seriously. This is net-new for us, not replacing anything.

next_steps: Set up technical eval with Dylan

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Samuel with discovery recap, ROI calculator showing $180K savings potential, and demo invite. He confirmed demo time and said Dylan will join the technical eval call.

Technical evaluation call with Dylan Iyer. Walked through CRM integration, data security protocols, and API capabilities. Dylan asked detailed questions about data sync frequency and asked for architecture diagrams. He seemed satisfied with technical answers but wants to review documentation before final approval.

questions_asked.question: What's the data sync frequency with our CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time sync for critical fields, hourly batch for historical data. Fully configurable.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data security and compliance?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, data encrypted at rest and in transit. Can provide full security documentation.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the forecasting models?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the consulting tier includes custom model tuning for your specific business.

objections: Need to review security documentation in detail before I can give final technical approval.
next_steps: Send architecture diagrams and security docs
Dylan to review and confirm technical fit

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Samuel with demo prep materials and confirmation. Also sent security docs and architecture diagrams to Dylan as requested. Samuel replied confirming he's excited for the demo.

Product demo with Samuel Green. Walked through forecasting automation, reporting dashboards, and consulting workflow. Samuel was impressed with the UI and automation capabilities. He asked about onboarding timeline and confirmed he'd bring this to Harper Ali next week for budget approval. Discussed pricing ballpark of $49K for 42 seats.

questions_asked.question: How hands-on is the consulting piece during onboarding?
questions_asked.answer: You get a dedicated CS consultant for the first 90 days, weekly check-ins, then monthly ongoing.

questions_asked.question: What concerns do you think Harper will have?
questions_asked.answer: Mainly ROI and timeline. She's supportive but wants to see the business case clearly.

next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with Harper Ali
Send formal proposal with ROI analysis

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Harper Ali (CRO) and Samuel Green. Harper asked focused questions about ROI, implementation risk, and contract terms. She's seen the business case and is supportive. Asked about payment terms and whether pricing is flexible. Samuel advocated strongly for the solution. Harper wants a formal proposal to review with procurement.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical ROI timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable improvement in forecast accuracy within 60 days, full ROI within 6-9 months.

questions_asked.question: What are your standard payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Annual upfront is standard, but we can discuss quarterly or other structures if needed.

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Harper Ali to discuss proposal. She reviewed the $49,400 ACV proposal and asked about discount options and contract flexibility. Mentioned their fiscal year ends soon and they're trying to close within budget. Introduced Liam Lima from procurement to handle contract details. Harper indicated pricing is slightly higher than expected.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing given our team size and commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We have some flexibility. Let me work with my leadership on a revised proposal.

questions_asked.question: Can we do a shorter initial term with renewal option?
questions_asked.answer: Our standard is annual. I can explore a 6-month pilot structure if that helps.

objections: Pricing is a bit higher than we budgeted. Need to see if there's room to move.
next_steps: Schedule pricing call with Samuel and Liam

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Samuel Green and Liam Lima (Sales Manager handling procurement). Discussed discount options—they're looking for 10-12% discount to fit budget. Liam outlined standard contract terms they need (quarterly payments, 30-day termination clause). Samuel emphasized urgency to close this quarter. Agreed to come back with revised proposal.

questions_asked.question: Can you accommodate quarterly payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure quarterly payments. May need a small adjustment to pricing for payment plan.

questions_asked.question: What discount level would get this over the line?
questions_asked.answer: 10-12% would fit our budget comfortably.

next_steps: Prepare revised proposal with discount and quarterly terms
Send to Harper for final review

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Samuel with revised proposal: $49,400 ACV with 8% discount, quarterly payment terms, standard contract. He replied saying he's reviewing with Harper and Liam, expects feedback by end of week.

Negotiation call with Samuel Green (originally scheduled earlier but was rescheduled once). Discussed final contract terms. Samuel said Harper approved the 8% discount and quarterly terms. Dylan confirmed technical fit. They want to add a 60-day out-clause for first payment period. Agreed to run this by legal and get back to them. Samuel confirmed they're ready to sign once terms are finalized.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a 60-day out-clause for the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: That's non-standard but let me check with our legal team. Shouldn't be a blocker.

touches.ai_summary: Final executive meeting with Harper Ali, Samuel Green, and Liam Lima. Reviewed final contract terms with 8% discount, quarterly payments, and approved 60-day out-clause. Harper confirmed budget approval and said they're ready to proceed. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline. Harper and Samuel both expressed confidence in the partnership. Agreed to send DocuSign for signatures.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 5 business days of signed contract.
